title: 10 Herbal Teas For High Blood Pressure
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains bioactive constituents like glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and saponins, which help to manage high blood pressure. Glycyrrhizin reduces the activity of the enzyme 11-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase type 2, which is involved in the production of aldosterone, a hormone that can increase blood pressure. Flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that help to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow. ...
